title: Design / Architecture Workflow
triggeredBy: bootstrap or user requesting system architecture, data models, or tradeoff analysis
intent: Formulate structural guarantees and generate L9-level system blueprints without rushing to implementation
throwbacks: tradeoff-matrix: re-evaluate if security flags critical vulnerabilities

nodes.description: Draft the foundational system design: agent layers, memory, retrieval, observability
Design the system to resist prompt injection, tool misuse, and data leakage at the architectural level
Validate inference-heavy scalability, latency budgets, and cost efficiency
Compare architectural, model, and workflow alternatives across explicit tradeoff axes (build-vs-buy, RAG-vs-fine-tune)
Compare tools, models, frameworks across explicit evaluation axes to inform the tradeoff decision
Apply distinguished-engineer-level judgment to produce the final architectural decision
Validate the blueprint against enterprise-wide platform strategy and design contracts

next.condition: blueprint passes L9 and enterprise contracts

nodes.description: Final sign-off: reject any strategy that retains legacy duck-tape patterns
